jd_summary: Employee Relations Consultant at a Portland health system, advising management and employees on employee/labor relations, investigations, policy, and HR services to foster a respectful, high-performing workplace. Requires deep ER/labor-law knowledge; health-care experience preferred.
yoe_required: Seven years or more of progressively responsible HR experience

key_points.one_liner: Senior Employee Relations Consultant (7+ yrs HR) at Legacy Health - strong ER/labor focus; YOE well above at-level.
key_points.years_experience_asked: Seven years or more of progressively responsible HR experience
must_have_skills: Bachelor's degree, Master's preferred (relevant experience may substitute)
Seven years or more of progressively responsible experience in the HR field
Knowledge of laws, acts and regulations governing employee and labor relations
